title: Pathetic Fallacy
actors: Kali Bannerjee, Gangapada Basu, Satindra Bhattacharya
plot: Bimal is a taxi-driver in a small town. His taxi is his only companion and, although very battered, it is the apple of Bimal's eye. The film shows the love of taxi driver Bimal and his pathetic vehicle Jagaddal.
